class.name: SpecialChars_123!@#$%^
class.description: This class tests handling of special characters in various contexts: - Angle brackets: < > - Ampersand: & - Quotes: ' " - Unicode: ™ © ® → ← ↑ ↓ - Emoji: 🎮 🎨 🎯 - Mathematical: ∑ ∏ ∫ ∂ ∇

method.name: unicode_test
method.description: Tests Unicode: 你好世界 مرحبا العالم Привет мир
